versions.version_description: Corrected Chords in verse, chorus, and bridge.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]DM7[/ch]  -  [ch]C#m7[/ch]  -  [ch]Bm7[/ch]  - 

[tab][ch]AM7[/ch]   [ch]DM7[/ch]    [ch]C#m7[/ch] - [ch]Bm7[/ch]
Yeah, oh     yeah[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]AM7[/ch]
Alright, oh, oh, oh[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
It's amazing how you knock me off my feet, mmm[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
Every time you come around me I get weak, oh yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
Nobody ever made me feel this way, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                  [ch]C#m7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
You kiss my lips and then you take my breath away[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]DM7[/ch]
So, I wanna know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (yeah, I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (I'd like to know, yeah)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]         [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (so)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]Fdim7[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
Girl, he never understood what you were worth (hmm, no)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                   [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] -   [ch]AM7[/ch]
And he never took the time to make it work, no[/tab]

(You deserve more lovin', girl)
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                   [ch]C#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch] -         [ch]AM7[/ch]
Baby, I'm the kind of man who shows concern, yes I do, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch] -   [ch]AM7[/ch]
Any way that I can please you, let me learn[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]DM7[/ch]
So, I wanna know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (I wanna know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]                   [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (so)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]Fdim7[/ch]            [ch]F#m7[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]

(make you smile, baby)


[Bridge]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Tell me what I gotta do to please you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]AM7[/ch]
Baby, anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]                      [ch]AM7[/ch]
From the bottom of my heart, it's true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Tell me what I gotta do to please you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]AM7[/ch]
Baby, anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]DM7[/ch]                   [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]                      [ch]AM7[/ch]
From the bottom of my heart, it's true[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]                        [ch]Bm7[/ch] -     [ch]AM7[/ch]
I wish that I could take a journey through your mind, alright[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                        [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch] -   [ch]AM7[/ch]
And find emotions that you always try to hide babe, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch] -    [ch]AM7[/ch]
I do believe that there's a love you wanna share, oh, oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]                         [ch]C#m7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch] -   [ch]AM7[/ch]
I'll take good care of you, lady, have no fear, oh[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]DM7[/ch]
So I wanna know[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (I wanna know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (and I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]         [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (oh, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]Fdim7[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]

(ooh, tell me, tell me)


[Bridge]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Tell me what I gotta do to please you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]AM7[/ch]
Baby, anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]                      [ch]AM7[/ch]
From the bottom of my heart, it's true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Tell me what I gotta do to please you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]AM7[/ch]
Baby, anything you say I'll do[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]DM7[/ch]                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]
Cause I only wanna make you happy[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
From the bottom of my heart, it's true[/tab]


[Fading Chorus]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (I'd like to know, I'd like to know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
So I can be all that and more (I wanna know)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]         [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I'd like to know what makes you cry (So, yeah)[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]           [ch]Fdim7[/ch]            [ch]F#m7[/ch]
So I can be the one who always makes you smile[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]     [ch]C#m7[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
I wanna know what turns you on (Tell me, girl)[/tab]
[tab][ch]DM7[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]Bm7[/ch] - [ch]AM7[/ch]
So I can be all that and more[/tab]
